prompt: I want to test HSM archive with 4 concurrent copytools writing large files

assertions.name: skips_interview
assertions.description: Does not ask clarifying questions — goes straight to collection and presentation

assertions.name: collects_from_mds
assertions.description: Runs collector with a filter that includes MDS node

assertions.name: mentions_max_requests
assertions.description: Surfaces HSM max_requests and relates it to the 4 concurrent copytools

assertions.name: uses_tables
assertions.description: Presents data in structured tables or lists, not raw JSON dump

assertions.name: mentions_concurrency
assertions.description: Addresses concurrency capacity (thread pools, queuing, or max_requests vs requested parallelism)
